title: mantis-delta: Mass-Action Network Theory, Inference, and Stability for Chemical Reaction Networks
description: A pure-Python library for rigorous structural and numerical analysis of chemical reaction networks under mass-action kinetics: deficiency theorems, symbolic ODE/Jacobian construction, hybrid steady-state solving, exhaustive (homotopy) steady-state enumeration, global Lyapunov stability certification, stochastic simulation, SBML interoperability, and bifurcation analysis.

creators.name: Venegas, Emilio A.
creators.affiliation: Tecnológico de Monterrey, Escuela de Medicina y Ciencias de la Salud, Monterrey, México
